---
title: "Practice 3c - VLOOKUP"
author: "Dr. Bartosiak"
---

# Practie video 3c

::: {.callout-tip title="Windows" collapse="true"}
{{< video https://youtu.be/Ke1V5pDmA3I title="Practice 3c Windows" >}}
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Mac" collapse="true"}
{{< video https://youtu.be/V9oPe65OVOo title="Practice 3c Mac" >}}
:::

## Answer key

[Answer key](/_files/keys/key_intromis-3-c_1.xlsx){target="_blank"}

# Instructions

[Starter Workbook](/_files/starters/starter_intromis-3-c.xlsx){target="_blank"}

## Tasks and Steps

1.  Download and open the starter file.
2.	In the Advanced Calculations worksheet perform the following using the VLOOKUP function. [Mac](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/vlookup-function-0bbc8083-26fe-4963-8ab8-93a18ad188a1) [Win](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/vlookup-function-0bbc8083-26fe-4963-8ab8-93a18ad188a1)

  - In cell G2, report the name of the chain with the lowest number of units.
  - In cell G3, report the name of the chain with the highest number of units.
  - In cell G4, report the name of the chain with the lowest revenue.
  - In cell G5, report the name of the chain with the highest revenue.

3.  Save the file and close it.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
.disclaimer {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  color: #666;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding-top: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<div>
  {{< include footer.html >}}
</div>
```
